user/skills/lazy-batch/SKILL.md.notes: lazy-batch-skill-deflation Phase 3 seed ceiling — locked at the END-OF-SESSION size (after the Phase-1 model-selection excision AND the follow-up (ii) efficacy-signal-integrity D4 KPI-scorecard-flush wiring, a separate deliberate addition landed the same session, net +1529B/+1 long-line over the mid-session excision-only figure). This stops further accretion (+57%/4wk observed pre-gate) immediately; the diet's remaining Phase 1/2 hotspot excisions will lower this via --lock-in as they land, not raise it. 2026-07-13: +138B — deliberate hand-edit for cli-surface-lint findings (stale --gate-coverage/--run-end/--park cross-attribution fixes); a correctness fix, not accretion. 2026-07-17: deliberate hand-edit for harden-harness rounds 68/70 (dispatched-harden --record-intervention containment exemption bracket note §1d.1 + the §1c.6 flush-commit staging contract, one-writer coordination — end-of-run-flush-commit-absorbs-concurrent-writer-staged-files); mandated contract prose, not accretion — a correctness/contract fix. 2026-07-18: deliberate hand-edit for spike-pipeline-role Phase 3 (the new §1c.7 Spike cycle-handling orchestrator seam — dispatch-class routing, --ensure-runtime pre-boot, PASS/FAIL branch, provisional-FAIL carve-out + State Machine Summary bullet; cloud=defer-to-workstation, bug=bug-axis mirror via the overlay generator); a required feature deliverable, not accretion. 2026-07-19: hand-raised byte/long-line ceilings to current — deliberate documented growth (spike-pipeline-role Phase 3 + harden rounds 68/70, already recorded above) landed without a baseline realignment, leaving the ratchet red though it was not yet wired into the gate battery; cycle-prompt-deflation Part-1 WU-3 wires --check-skill-size INTO the battery, so the ceilings are realigned to current here (ratchet sanctioned legitimate-growth path) — not accretion, a corrective realignment. 2026-07-19: orchestrator-tool-search Phase 3 — hand-raised byte ceilings to current for the terse `--tool-search` search-before-acting rule (SKILL.md files, near harden-Trigger 5) + the new always-present `tool-search` @section in cycle-base-prompt.md (all 20 assembled-prompt profiles). Deliberate feature deliverable (SPEC 'Prose wiring'), each added line <500 chars so no long-line ceiling moved; sanctioned legitimate-growth realignment, not accretion.

profiles._notes: cycle-prompt-deflation Phase 1 seed ceilings for the assembled per-cycle dispatch prompt. A profile id is pipeline/mode/skill[/variant]; ceilings are len(emit_cycle_prompt(...).prompt.encode(utf-8)) driven through the REAL emitter (never a re-parse of cycle-base-prompt.md). park/host dims are OUT of v1 enumeration (SPEC KPI selector is over pipeline,mode,skill,variant; host resolved by live os.name). Seeded at pre-deflation sizes 2026-07-19 to LOCK the before-numbers + stop accretion; Phases 2-3 lower these via --lock-in-profile.
